capability_profile.notes: Agent is a rolling body moved by forces; enemies are passive dynamic bodies with initial velocities that bounce in the arena.

common_failures: Do not lower minimum_acceptance_tier for simple known tasks just to pass validation.
Keep capability_profile controls honest; no teleporting or direct object mutation.
Tier 5 patterns must be physically solved by check_objective(), not just progress-verified.
generation_guidance: Reuse this objective/capability profile shape when the prompt semantics match.
Do not use validator controls outside capability_profile['allowed_controls'].
Expose progress metrics: distance_to_goal_center, min_distance_to_enemy, agent_touched.

objective_profile.objective_description: Navigate through the maze to reach the gold goal without being touched by roaming enemies.
objective_profile.success_predicate: agent enters goal region AND agent has not been touched by any enemy

source_prompt: Agent must navigate through maze to gold while avoiding enemies trying to touch it. If agent gets touched. it loses
summary: Navigate through the maze to reach the gold goal without being touched by roaming enemies. Validated as solved_verified with movement=ground_force, gravity=normal.

verification.reason: Code-level objective satisfied during subgoal validation.
